mapper.select:
/** UsptEvlTrgetPresentnHistDao.selectHistList */ select presentn_hist_id , evl_trget_id , presnatn_process_div_cd , coalesce(public.fn_cmm_get_code_nm('PRESNATN_PROCESS_DIV', presnatn_process_div_cd), '미진행') as presnatn_process_div_nm -- 발표자료 처리구분명 , process_dt , resn_cn
, creator_id as opetr_id , creator_id , created_dt , row_number() over (order by created_dt asc) as rn from uspt_evl_trget_presentn_hist where evl_trget_id = #{evlTrgetId}
